etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "jolly" + "-ness" from Old French "jolif" (festive, merry)

etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Festive state → cheerful merriment → contemporary jolliness cheerfulness and jolliness merriment with cheerful presence
